titleStmt.title: SII 18.93: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 93. (B.K. No. 66 of 1934-35.) UKKUND, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 13, Vibhava, Chaītra śu. Das11ami, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1088, March 5, Sunday.

It records the construction of a temple of Śiva by Dāsagāvuṇḍa of Orkkunda and a grant of land made by him to that temple. The gift is stated to have been entrusted to Abhimānasiṅgha-paṇḍita, the disciple of Gaṅgarāśi-paṇḍita. It also records the grant of certain taxes made to Dāsagāvuṇḍa by Siriyāgaradēva, when Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Vijayāditya of the Māṭūra family was governing Beḷuhuge Seventy, Mugunda Twelve, Eḍenāḍu Seventy, Taḍeyūru Twelve and other villages. It is also stated that Mahāpradhāna and Daṇḍanāyaka Sōmēśvarabhaṭṭa was governing the Two Six-hundreds and Banavāse Twelve-thousand.
A supplementary grant of taxes, made by Sōmēs11varabhaṭṭa to Dāsagāvuṇḍa, is engraved at the top of the stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© pratyakṣavastuviṣayāya jagaddhitāya . visvastu tipraḷayasaṁbhavakāraṇāya sarvvātma nē vijitakōpaReadśvasthi.
manōbhavāya stubhyaṁ nama(ḥ)stribhuvanaprabhavē śsivāya . sattaḷige 70ttaṟa baḷiya bāḍavorkkundada dāsaThe letterbha is written below the line.
gāvuṇḍage Alliya koṁge vosage baṇnige sāda kiṟudeṟe kiṟukuḷāyaṁ sarbāyasuddhi yāgi yāva kālakkaṁ śrī
maddhaṇḍanāyakaṁ sōmēsvarabhaṭṭaru dayegeydu koṭṭaru . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ .
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbica(ṁ)ndracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhē mūlastaṁ bāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabha ṭṭārakaṁ satyā
srayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyābhivriddhipravarddhamāna
mācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahā
sāmantādhipati vivēkavācaspati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . vidvajjanaphaḷapradāyakaṁ viprakuḷa
kamaḷākaradyumaṇi śaraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi sāhityavidyāsarasvati satyasatyabrata ni
yōgayōgandharaṁ patikāryyadurandharaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁganaṇnana siṁga nāmādisamastaprasa
stisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ sōmēsvarabhaṭṭaru Eraḍaṟunūṟu maṁ banavāse pannircchāsi
ramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipāḷanadinda sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire . svasti samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ trikundapuravarādhīsvaraṁ brahmakṣatriyasikhāmaṇi
subhaṭasirōmaṇi mūṭūravaṁsōdbhavaṁ yuvatījanacittōdbhavaṁ nandanavanacchatrahaya lāṁca
naṁ dattārtthikāṁcana darppaṇadhvajavirājamānaṁ dānakānīnanahiccatrāvatāranēkāṁga vīraṁ sāhasōttuṁ
ganayyana siṁga nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ vijayāditya dēvarbbeḷuhuge
Eppattuṁ mugandaṁ panneraḍuṁ Eḍanāḍerppattu taḍeyūru panneraḍuṁ Ēḷūru kalpattiyi(ṁ)ntī bāḍaṁgaḷuṁ sīvaṭṭidūru perddeseThe letter ra is written below this line.
yuṁ kannavaḷḷiye(ṁ)ndinitaṟa manneyamanāḷuttamiṟdu Orkkundada dāsagāvuṇḍage Alli ya haṁdarahaṇa ko
ledeṟe kōṭevuḍḍige koḷaṁ kummari parihāramāgi siriyāgaradēvaṁ koṭṭa . svastyanēka guṇagaṇāḷaṁkri
ta satyasaucacārucāritranayavineya śuṣīḷa saṁpannaṁ nuḍidu mattennaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ sujanaikamitraṁ paraReadsuśīla.
nārīdūraṁ haracaraṇakamaḷabhriṁganayyanasiṁga nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmado rkkunda kuṟuvara muddagā
vuṇḍana magaṁ dāsagāvuṇḍanantēkabhōgadinūrggavuṇḍu geyyuttamiṟdu . vritta . vi neyāṁbhōnidhi māḷikabbe baba(ba)
bā®pammamma tāyi tande peṁpina sāmartthyada satyadāgaramenippā muddagāvuṇḍanenda de siṣṭēṣṭajanō
pakāri paranārīmanmathaṁ vairimaṟdana kēḷu dāsaya ninna peṁpanadaninnēvaṇnipaṁ baṇnipa . manmārgganēka
vākyaṁ dinakarapadābjabhriṁganamaḷacaritraṁ vineyūṁburāśiyāśritajanake tavarmmane daleni
pa kuṟuvara dāsi . vritta . Eredartijanadāseyaṁ kiḍipanā mmā daṁ pēḷve kēḷparanārījanadūranaṁ parahi
taprāraṁbhanaṁ dāsiyaṁ dhareyellaṁ sale kūḍe baṇnipudadaṁ muṁmēṟeyillāgade surabhū jakkeṇe kāmadhē
nusadrisaṁ śrīdānakānīnana . gaṁgāsnānapavitre mattagajagamane jātikabbege dore kāmāṁganeye pāṭi pāsaṭi Aṁgane dā
sigana satigavēṁ samanoḷare . kandarppavairiyaghaharanindudharaṁ tripuravairiyandhakahara ṇaṁ mandākinīśanī yokkuṁdada kalidēvanīge dāsige
subhama . karivadanaṁ gaurēyaṁ haratanayanahīṁdrabhūṣaṇaṁ parasudharaṁ paramōtsāhade gaṇapaṁ nirantaraṁ mūrkke dāsigaṁgutsavama .
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 13 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada caitra suddha daśami Ādityavāradandu liṁgapratiṣṭhe
yaṁ māḍi sivāleyamanettisi . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānu ṣṭāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpanna
rappa śrīmatu gaṁgarāsipaṇḍitara śiṣyarabhimānasiṁghapaṇḍitargge Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyandu kālaṁ karci dhā
rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi dāsagāvuṇḍaṁ koṭṭa gaṟde piriya keṟeya keḷage kammamirppattu beṟdale mūḍaṇa Ere mattaronhu pa
ḍhuva mūlasthānadēvara munde kisumattarondu puravarggakke Aydu maneyuṁ Intī dharmmamanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisida ma
hāpuruṣaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ prayāge Argghyatīrtthadoḷaṁ sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇarggaṁ sāsirvvarttapōdhanarigaṁ sāsi
ra kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnaluṁ beḷḷiyaluṁ kaṭṭisi dānaṁ geyda phalamakku . Intī dharmmavanaḷivanuṁ Aḷivaraloḍaṁ
baḍevanuṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge Arghyatīrtthadoḷaṁ sāsirvvarttapō dhanarumaṁ sāsirvvaru brā(ṁ)hmaṇaruma(ṁ)naḷida
paṁcamahāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā saṣṭirvvariṣa sahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē(ḥ)krimi .
sāmānyō dharmasētu nripāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō dbhavadbhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . samasta
guṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatsēnabōvabīcana barepa . śrīmajjagadēkarūvāri bammōjana magaṁ kalkuṭiga mā
ga mācōjana citraṁ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
